description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain pattern and a smooth finish. The handle is ergonomically shaped, widening at the base for a secure grip and tapering toward the head. The axe head is made of dark metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end. The blade edge is slightly curved, designed for efficient chopping, while the poll is squared off for striking. The head is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fitting, with no visible screws or bolts. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a dark, wedge-shaped metal blade, featuring a broad cutting edge and a flat poll.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad face of the axe blade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full profile of the handle and the thin, sharp edge of the blade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the axe head and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's profile and the flat poll of the axe head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with ergonomic grip, natural grain, and oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped blade with a slightly curved edge and a flat poll; no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting securing the blade to the handle.
